expectations.text: Covers all major screen areas (dashboard, detail, protocol, admin)
expectations.evidence: Has a Dashboard (§1), Batch Detail (§3), and User/Settings (§9), but no protocol screen and no admin screen are present anywhere in the document

expectations.text: Maps each screen to specific endpoint(s)
expectations.evidence: Each of the 10 listed screens has at least one endpoint, e.g. Batch Detail maps `GET /api/batches/:id`, `GET /api/batches/:id/readings`, `GET /api/batches/:id/notes`

expectations.text: Flags the X-Winery-ID header on historical endpoints
expectations.evidence: The document contains no mention of X-Winery-ID, winery headers, or any header requirements for historical data access
The document contains no mention of mobile-first design, small viewports, phone usage, or any mobile-related constraints

expectations.text: Mentions analysis engine endpoints for the anomaly/recommendation flow
expectations.evidence: No analysis engine, anomaly detection, or recommendation endpoints appear anywhere; the closest is `GET /api/alerts` on the dashboard, which is unrelated to post-sample analysis
